summary: Comprehensive testing of Inter-Agent Communication feature completed. All backend API endpoints (GET /api/orchestrator/communication/log, GET /api/orchestrator/communication/stats, POST /api/orchestrator/communication/send, POST /api/orchestrator/communication/handoff) are working correctly. Frontend UI features including 'Comms' tab with stats cards, Agent Communication Activity section, Communication Log, and Handoff button on error rows are all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Inter-agent communication system well-implemented in central_agent_orchestrator.py (lines 1236-1600)
API endpoints properly secured with admin/superadmin role check
Frontend Comms tab correctly displays stats cards (Total Messages, Handoffs, Consultations, Escalations)
Agent Communication Activity section shows per-agent send/receive counts
Communication Log displays messages with type badges and timestamps
Manual Error Handoff dialog works with agent dropdowns and reason field
data-testid attributes present for key UI elements (handoff-btn)
seed_data_creation: Test messages created via POST /api/orchestrator/communication/send endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inter-agent communication system fully functional. Test messages exist in communication log. Communication stats endpoint returns per-agent statistics with sent/received/handoffs counts.

New 'Comms' tab visible in Agent Control.details: Comms tab visible with arrow icon, shows 'Inter-Agent Communication' header and 'Monitor agent-to-agent messages, handoffs, and consultations' description

Communication stats cards showing (Total.details: All 4 stats cards visible with colored backgrounds - Total Messages (3), Handoffs (0), Consultations (2), Escalations (0)

Agent Communication Activity section sho.details: Shows Error Auto-Fix Agent (Sent: 3), UI Blink Fix Agent (Received: 2), Performance Optimization Agent (Received: 1) with handoff counts

Communication Log section displaying mes.details: Shows real-time inter-agent messages with type badges (notification, consultation), from/to agent names, timestamps

Handoff button visible on error rows in.details: Handoff button visible on failed error rows, opens 'Manual Error Handoff' dialog with From Agent, To Agent dropdowns and Reason field

POST /api/orchestrator/communication/sen.details: Successfully creates messages with from_agent, to_agent, message_type, content, returns message_id
